name: Salesforce
one_liner: Enterprise CRM for sales, service, and marketing
gating: Free Developer Edition org self-serve at developer.salesforce.com
api_surface: REST + SOAP + Bulk + GraphQL, very broad (thousands of objects/endpoints)

name: HubSpot
gating: Free tier self-serve, private app tokens instant

name: Twenty
gating: Open source, self-host or free cloud tier

name: Podio
gating: Free tier self-serve, app largely in maintenance mode
blocker: Platform is legacy/lightly maintained, docs inconsistent

name: Close
one_liner: Inside-sales CRM with calling/email built in

name: DealCloud
one_liner: CRM/deal management for PE, M&A, banking
gating: Requires an existing DealCloud client site + admin-granted API key; no public trial signup
api_surface: REST, broad; MCP server in client preview as of July 2026
blocker: No self-serve account; must already be a paying DealCloud customer with admin access

name: Front
gating: Trial available, but core plans are paid

name: Pylon
gating: Requires a Pylon workspace; token generated in dashboard, pricing not fully self-serve-transparent
api_surface: REST, moderate-broad; Pylon MCP already exists
blocker: Onboarding leans sales-assisted even though token generation itself is self-serve

name: Gladly
gating: No public trial/signup; enterprise contact-sales product
api_surface: REST, moderate, docs behind limited public access
blocker: Contact-sales enterprise gate, no free/trial credentials path

name: Zoho Cliq
one_liner: Team chat app in the Zoho suite

name: Lark (Larksuite)
api_surface: REST, very broad (docs, base, messaging, calendar)

name: Pumble
gating: Free plan, but public API is limited/early
blocker: Public API surface is thin compared to Slack/Discord equivalents

name: Telegram
one_liner: Messaging app with a public bot platform

name: WhatsApp Business
gating: Requires Meta Business verification + WABA setup; not instant self-serve
blocker: Business verification and phone number registration required before use

name: Aircall
one_liner: Cloud call center / business phone system

name: Google Ads
gating: Requires a developer token from Google, basic access approved fast but standard access needs review
blocker: Developer token approval gate before higher API access tiers

name: Meta Ads
gating: App Review required for most marketing permissions beyond dev mode
blocker: Meta App Review needed for production-level ad permissions

name: LinkedIn Ads
gating: Marketing API requires LinkedIn Partner Program approval
blocker: Partner program application/approval required, not self-serve

name: Pinterest
gating: Standard access self-serve; advanced ad scopes need app review
blocker: Advanced scopes gated behind Pinterest app review

name: Threads (Meta)
gating: Meta App Review required, API surface still limited
blocker: Meta App Review + limited scope of what the API exposes

name: Shopify
api_surface: REST + GraphQL Admin API, very broad

name: WooCommerce
gating: Self-hosted, free once you have a WordPress store

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
gating: Enterprise product, requires existing SFCC org / contact sales
blocker: No free self-serve org; requires an existing enterprise instance

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
one_liner: Ecommerce platform, open-source core + Adobe enterprise tier
gating: Open-source edition self-hostable free; Adobe Commerce (enterprise) is contact-sales
blocker: Two-tier product: OSS self-serve, Adobe Commerce enterprise gated

name: Squarespace
gating: Commerce API requires a paid Commerce plan
blocker: Requires a paid Commerce-tier subscription to unlock the API

name: Amazon Selling Partner
gating: Requires an approved Amazon Seller account + registered SP-API app; review process
blocker: Seller account approval + app registration/review gate

name: fanbasis
gating: Sandbox self-serve, but production payouts require account review/KYC and a sales-assisted go-live
blocker: Production access gated behind account review; sandbox is open

name: SE Ranking
gating: API access requires a paid plan
blocker: No free API tier, paid plan required

name: Ahrefs
gating: API requires a paid Ahrefs subscription with API credits add-on
blocker: Paid subscription + separate API credit purchase required

name: MrScraper
gating: Free tier with limited tokens, no credit card required; paid tiers from $49/mo
api_surface: REST (app.mrscraper.com/api), moderate - AI extraction, screenshots, bulk scraping

name: Apify
api_surface: REST, very broad (platform + marketplace of scrapers)

name: Sherlock
one_liner: OSS CLI tool to find usernames across sites
api_surface: No REST API - it's a local CLI/script, not a hosted service
blocker: Not a hosted API/toolkit at all - it's a local Python script; would need to be wrapped, not integrated

name: Waterfall.io
gating: Usage-based pricing, no monthly commitment; trial available, sales-friendly onboarding but not sales-gated to start
api_surface: REST (api.waterfall.io/v1) - Prospector, Contact/Phone/Company Enrichment, Email Verification

name: Clay
gating: API access tied to paid plans, no free-tier API key
blocker: No free API access; requires paid Clay plan

name: GitHub
one_liner: Code hosting, CI, and collaboration platform

name: Cloudflare
one_liner: CDN, DNS, security, and edge compute platform

name: Neo4j
api_surface: Driver/Bolt protocol + limited REST; not a classic REST API
blocker: Primary interface is a DB driver protocol, not a typical REST surface - agent tooling needs a driver wrapper

name: Plaid
gating: Sandbox self-serve free; Production requires application review
blocker: Production access requires Plaid's approval process

name: Binance
gating: Free self-serve, KYC required for full trading limits
blocker: Full trading access requires identity verification

name: Paygent Connect
gating: Payment processing product, requires merchant account setup / partner onboarding
blocker: No public self-serve signup found; merchant onboarding required, low visibility into public docs

name: iPayX
gating: Narrow B2B FX-audit product (not a generic payment gateway - distinct from unrelated 'iPay' gateways in Africa/elsewhere); has a public MCP server, but no visible public self-serve signup/pricing page
api_surface: Narrow, FX-forensic-audit focused; official 'iPayX FX Audit MCP Server' listed in MCP directories
blocker: No public self-serve pricing/signup found; likely requires direct contact despite the MCP server existing

name: QuickBooks
gating: Free sandbox self-serve; production app requires Intuit review
blocker: Production/public app listing requires Intuit's app review

name: Xero
gating: Free demo company self-serve for dev

name: Brex
gating: Requires an existing Brex business account
blocker: No API access without an active Brex corporate account (business-only product)

name: Ramp
gating: Requires an existing Ramp business account
blocker: No API access without an active Ramp corporate account

name: PitchBook
gating: Contact-sales enterprise data product, no public API signup
api_surface: Unknown publicly; data delivered via Excel plugin/exports for most customers
blocker: No self-serve or public API docs found; enterprise sales-gated

name: NotebookLM
gating: Consumer NotebookLM has no public API; only the separate Gemini Enterprise API is programmable
api_surface: No public REST API for NotebookLM itself
blocker: The product as branded has no developer API; would need to use Gemini Enterprise instead, which is a different product

name: Otter AI
gating: No public API key program at all ('we currently do not have a public API key at this time'); official MCP server exists but is gated to Business/Enterprise workspaces with admin provisioning
api_surface: No public REST API; MCP server (mcp.otter.ai) is the only sanctioned programmatic access, OAuth-authenticated
blocker: No public API key issuance; MCP access requires an Otter Business/Enterprise plan and admin setup

name: Fathom
gating: API available on paid Team plans
blocker: API gated behind a paid plan tier

name: Consensus
one_liner: AI search engine for scientific research papers
gating: Free developer account self-serve for the quick_search API (rate-limited); unlimited/enterprise volume requires contact-sales
blocker: Free tier is rate-limited; meaningful production volume needs an enterprise conversation

name: Reducto
one_liner: Document parsing/extraction API for AI pipelines
gating: 15,000 free credits on Standard (pay-as-you-go) tier, instant signup
api_surface: REST, moderate-broad (Parse/Extract/Split/Edit/Classify); has an official MCP server (mcp-server-reducto)

name: Devin
api_surface: REST, moderate; has an official MCP server
blocker: No free tier; API access tied to paid seats

name: higgsfield
one_liner: AI video/content generation suite with a CLI
gating: Free tier for testing via cloud.higgsfield.ai signup, paid plans for production volume
api_surface: REST, moderate; official Python SDK (higgsfield-ai/higgsfield-client) on GitHub

name: Mermaid CLI
one_liner: CLI to render Mermaid diagrams to images
api_surface: No REST API - local CLI tool only
blocker: Not a network API - toolkit would wrap local CLI execution rather than call a hosted service

name: YouTube Transcript
one_liner: Third-party API to fetch YouTube video transcripts
gating: 100 free credits self-serve, no card required; paid from $5/mo
api_surface: REST (transcriptapi.com/api/v2) - transcripts, search, channels, playlists; official MCP server

name: Grain
one_liner: AI meeting recording and highlight reels
gating: API access gated behind paid Business plan
blocker: API only available on paid tiers, not free plan
